title: Settings & Customisation
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Settings & Customisation | BarkinMad Studios
description: Customise Game Of Darts with appearance, caller voices, DartBot settings, privacy options, and gameplay preferences.
summary: Personalise Game Of Darts to suit the way you play, from appearance and audio through to DartBot, Game Center, and privacy settings.

sections.heading: Make the App Your Own
paragraphs: Game Of Darts includes a wide range of settings that let you personalise the app to match the way you play. Adjust gameplay options, appearance, accessibility, and audio without affecting your saved players, statistics, or match history.
Whether you prefer voice announcements, a different appearance, or customised gameplay settings, everything is available from one convenient place.

sections.heading: Gameplay Settings
paragraphs: Fine-tune your matches by adjusting gameplay options before or between games. Some settings become available after unlocking premium features.

sections.heading: Appearance & Audio
paragraphs: Choose the appearance that best suits your device, lighting conditions, and playing environment.
Audio settings allow you to control Caller Voices and other supported sounds, with your preferences remembered automatically for future matches.

sections.heading: Privacy & Data
paragraphs: Privacy settings provide access to Game Center features, synchronisation options, and other app preferences.
Player information and statistics can be synchronised across supported devices using the same Apple ID, while advertising preferences follow Apple's privacy controls where supported.

sections.heading: Update Your Preferences Anytime
paragraphs: You can return to Settings whenever you want to change the way Game Of Darts looks or behaves.
Most changes take effect immediately, making it easy to adapt the app for different venues, devices, or playing styles.

images.caption: Personalise Game Of Darts to suit your style of play.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything in One Place
featureShowcases.summary: Settings bring together appearance, audio, DartBot, Game Center, privacy, and premium options.
body: Whether you're preparing for a league night or a casual game with friends, Settings make it easy to tailor Game Of Darts to your preferences.
Adjust the experience whenever you like without affecting your saved players, statistics, or match history.
bullets: Manage Game Center, privacy, and premium settings.

image.caption: Everything you need to personalise the app.

featureShowcases.heading: Change Settings with Confidence
featureShowcases.summary: Personalise Game Of Darts without affecting your saved progress.
body: Update your preferences whenever you like, from Caller Voices and DartBot difficulty to appearance and privacy settings.
Your saved players, match history, and statistics remain untouched, so you can experiment with different options whenever it suits you.
bullets: No impact on saved players or statistics.
Ideal for different venues and playing styles.
Works alongside DartBot, Caller Voices, and premium features.
